title: Require Recipe Step Authoring Shape
forbids: recipe step config.ts and step.ts modules without exactly one named defineStep/createStep export, whose literal step id differs from the immediate step directory, with a wrongly named authoring export, or with any default export
why: A recipe step has one filesystem and runtime identity, one contract authoring call in config.ts, and one executable authoring call in step.ts. Exact directory/id equality and singular named values remove shadow authorities, path aliases, default exports, and barrel alternatives.
remediate: Make the kebab-case step directory equal the literal defineStep id, retain exactly one documented <Name>StepContract in config.ts and one documented <Name>Step in step.ts, and remove extra authoring calls and default exports.
message: Recipe step modules must use one exact directory/id identity and exactly one named *StepContract and *Step authoring value without default exports.
